name: Drunk Builder Simulator
short_description: Chaos hits the workplace: sneaky drinks, daring bluffs, and tense hide-and-seek. Survive the shift as a worker or catch them all as the supervisor in this fast-paced, asymmetric multiplayer party game.
detailed_description:
Someone’s getting drunk on the job… and it’s up to you to survive, bluff, and outsmart your coworkers—or catch them red-handed.

Drunk Builder Simulator is an asymmetric multiplayer social-stealth game where chaos and cunning collide. One player takes the role of the supervisor, tasked with watching, investigating, and catching workers in the act. The rest play as workers, sneaking sips, passing the bottle, and trying not to blow their cover.

Blend in with NPCs. Fake your tasks. Coordinate secret moves with teammates. Make daring passes and risky plays—but one mistake can ruin the whole team. Every action creates suspicion, and every delay raises tension.

🍺 Gameplay Highlights

  • Asymmetric multiplayer: 1 supervisor vs. a team of workers

  • Social stealth mechanics: blend in with NPCs, fake normal behavior, and avoid suspicion

  • Risk–reward bottle passing: passing the bottle quickly or to distant teammates grants bonuses, but increases exposure

  • Suspicion system: every move, slip, and delay matters

  • Mind games and bluffing: mislead, frame, or sacrifice teammates to survive

  • Dynamic maps & observation tools: including remote monitoring and interactive environments

🎯 How to Play

  • Workers: sneak drinks, pass the bottle, and coordinate with teammates without drawing attention. Use clever timing and positioning to outsmart the supervisor.

  • Supervisor: observe, investigate, and search suspicious workers—but each action takes time. Watch patterns, track behavior, and catch the culprits before the shift ends.

Every sip, step, and lie counts. Will you survive the shift as a worker, or will the supervisor catch you in the act? Fast-paced, chaotic, and hilarious, Drunk Builder Simulator turns a simple workplace into a battleground of wits, humor, and deception.
